privileged_info_summary: The profitability_analysis task uses sales_data.csv, a synthetic dataset with 1000 rows containing sales transactions across four product categories (Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture) and four regions (East, North, South, West). The dataset includes all required numeric columns (Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Unit_Cost, Unit_Price, Discount) and categorical columns (Product_Category, Region). The task requires creating two DAX measures (Gross_Profit = total sales minus COGS, Profit_Margin_Pct = Gross_Profit/Sales using DIVIDE), a Matrix visual with Product_Category as rows and Region as columns, and a Card visual for the profit margin percentage. The CSV export feature is used to export the matrix data as profit_by_category.csv.
